titleStmt.title: SII 24.24: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 24. (A.R. No. 334 of 1952-53.) CHAKRATTĀḺVĀR SHRINE, PILLARS OF THE VERANDAH.

summary.p: Damaged. Contains the praśasti commencing Tiṅgaḷēr-taru. Seems to record an endowment of 130 kāśu towards the upkeep of some maṭha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḷanai muṉaivaiyil piṭittut tantivāraṇak kaṭak kaḷiṟṟālutai
ppittaruḷi Anta mil perumpukaḻ cuntarapāṇṭiyan Oṟṟai veṇkuṭai
yuṅ kaṟṟai veṇkavariyum ciṅkācanamum veṅkaḷattiḻantu tanmuṭivi

ḻuttalaivirit taṭitaḷarn toṭat tollaiyil mullaiyūr turat
ti Olkaliṉ veṇāṭṭaraicai ceṇāṭṭotukki mevu pukaḻirā

makuṭamuvākeṭa muniṉtu viṟalakeḻu villavaṉ kuṭar maṭi koṇṭu taṉ
nāṭu viṭṭoṭi kāṭu pukkoḷippa vaciyam putu malar malain tāṅ keñcali

ṉvelai keḻukāntaḷurc cālaikkaḷamaṟuppit tāhavamallaṉum Añcakkevu
taṉṟāṅkarum paṭaiyāl Āṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuḷ kaṇṭappayyaṉum kaṅkā(ti)

taraṉum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal virutār vikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉum kaṭumuraṭcāṅkamayaṉu mutaliṉar camarapīṟāvottuṭaiya nimir kaṭar ponnoṭayṅkari puraviyoṭu
piṭittu tanṉāṭaiyiṟ cayaṅkoṇṭu tunnār koḷḷippākkai Oḷḷerimaṭuttu Orutani ttaṇṭāl porukaṭal Uṭutta Ilaṅkayar komakan vikkiramapākuviṉ viḷaṅkum Oruma

kuṭamum munṟeṉakkuṭaintu tenṉiḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu miḻantu Ēḻkaṭaliḻam pukkilaṅke
canākiya vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ parumaṇimakuṭamum kāṇṭaku tanatākkiya kanna
kucciyilum Ār kaṭaliḻañ ciṟitenṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅkoḷ tannāṭu tan Uṟavoṭum pukuntu viḷa

ṅku muṭi kavitta viracalāmekan porkkaḷattañci kārkkaḷiṟiḻantu kavvaiyiṟṟoṭi kātaliyoṭum tan
tavvaiyaip piṭittu tāyai mukkariya Āṅkapimāṉam niṅkutaṟkāka miṭṭu vantu Avaṉ vāṭṭoḻi
l Uḻantu veṅkaḷattu lanta vacciṅkaḷattaraiyaṉ poṉnaṇi muṭiyum koṇṭu kaṉnaraṉ vaḻivantu Arai
koḷ Īḻattaraicanākiya cirivallavaṉ matanarājaṉ Elloḷi cuṭarmaṇi muṭiyuṅ koṇṭu vaṭa

pulattiru kālāvatum porupaṭai naṭātti kaṇṭaṉ tiṉakaraṉ nāraṇaṉ kaṇavati vaṇṭalar
teriyal maticūtananeṉ ṟeṉaip palavaraicarai munaivayiṟṟuratti vampalar tarupo

ppoṉakappaḻavarici Irukalamum tirukkaṇṇāmaṭai Iraṇṭukkup poṉakappaḻavarici kuṟuṇiyu
m tiruppāvāṭaikku Arici patakkum tirukkaṇṇāmaṭai Iraṇṭukkup paruppuk kuṟuṇi yum
kariyamutukkup paruppu patakkum Ākap paruppu mukkuṟuṇikkup paru—
ppu nāḻikkup payaṟu nāḻi Uṟiyākap payaṟu tūṇi nānāḻiyiṉāl payaṟu

10 Irai Iṟuppatākavum Innilattil
Uḻuta kuṭikaḷai Eppeṟpaṭṭa veḷḷān veṭṭikkum
vil Ūrkkālāl mukkalanelluk koḷvomā
kavum Inṉel Allatu maṟṟepperpa

tiruamutu cey
Iraṇṭu Ippon kaḻañcum
damaged. this and the following lines on further sections are badly damaged and disconnected

paṟṟu Irupattaiñcukku poṉ kaḻañcukku
ttiyā Ivartāma

yanāṟamutukku vaṇṇame poṉ mañcāṭiyu
kāṇimuntirikaiyum veṟṟilai Iraṇṭu māmukka
vaṇam poṉ
mpam cey 1 nya . (1/2) ci runtān karma

paṇam kili
raṅkanārāyaṇanāna
pāratāyan Ariñcayaṉ
hmaṇaṇiyanṉārum mokula
hāsa kāna �ruman mutuvan cāt
rum pāratāyaṉ nā
paṇittu
peruntiruvamutu ceytaruḷa tiruppāvāṭaip puṭavai
maṇam pavaḻikku nellu munnāḻiyāka nelluk kalaney kuṟuṇi nā
vaṉum ṉaci vaṉ tiruvāy ka ciyārum vantu ḻā
Badly damaged.
vaṉ tāmotiraṉum Āritaṉ cirākavaṉ kulamuṭaiyāṉum pāratāyaṉ cirāka
yaṟu kuṟuṇikkum payaṟu nāḻikku nellu nānāḻiyu kala nellu tū—

vaiyiṣṇavar vacam kuṭutta kācu nūṟṟu
muppatu Ikkācu nūṟṟu muppatum patineṭ
ṭṭu nāṭṭu śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukkāka I Imaṭam
Digital edition of SII 24.24 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
